heading: Counties eligible for assistance in more than one region
label: 15703 Counties eligible for assistance in more than one region
notes: Codificationand enacted identical sections. was repealed by .Pub. L. 110–234Pub. L. 110–246Pub. L. 110–234section 4(a) of Pub. L. 110–246
Effective DateSection effective on the first day of the first fiscal year beginning after , see , set out as a note under .June 18, 2008section 14217(d) of Pub. L. 110–246section 15101 of this title

children.heading: .—Limitation
children.label: a .—Limitation
children.text: A political subdivision of a State may not receive assistance under this subtitle in a fiscal year from more than one Commission.

children.heading: .—Selection of Commission
children.label: b .—Selection of Commission
children.text: A political subdivision included in the region of more than one Commission shall select the Commission with which it will participate by notifying, in writing, the Federal Cochairperson and the appropriate State member of that Commission.

children.heading: .—Changes in Selections
children.label: c .—Changes in Selections
children.text: The selection of a Commission by a political subdivision shall apply in the fiscal year in which the selection is made, and shall apply in each subsequent fiscal year unless the political subdivision, at least 90 days before the first day of the fiscal year, notifies the Cochairpersons of another Commission in writing that the political subdivision will participate in that Commission and also transmits a copy of such notification to the Cochairpersons of the Commission in which the political subdivision is currently participating.

children.heading: .—Inclusion of Appalachian Regional Commission
children.label: d .—Inclusion of Appalachian Regional Commission
children.text: In this section, the term “Commission” includes the Appalachian Regional Commission established under chapter 143.
